message:
feat(mux): add iOS Safari support with avc1 codec and Canvas 2D fallback

Safari rejects avc3 codec strings in VideoDecoder — switch to avc1 with
AVCDecoderConfigurationRecord description and in-place Annex B → AVCC
frame conversion. Add Canvas 2D renderer fallback for browsers without
WebGPU (iOS Safari). Remove navigator.gpu gate from Panel init.
